summary: Nowon went DPK in all 3 subs (고용진 갑 56.78, 우원식 을 62.67, 김성환 병 53.15). 노원 병 was tight: 이준석 (UFP, future Reform leader) ran and got 44.36% — the closest UFP came in a non-PPP-stronghold gu.

issues.label: 이준석's 2020 노원 병 run
issues.description: Lee Jun-seok's 44.36% in 병 was a close UFP performance; foreshadowed his rise as Reform Party leader.

issues.label: Middle-class apartment base
issues.description: Large residential apartment blocks anchor stable middle-class DPK vote.
